Interface JsonSerializer

All Known Implementing Classes:
JacksonSerializer
public interface JsonSerializer
Strategy interface for JSON serialization and deserialization.

Decouples the framework from any specific JSON library. The default implementation, JacksonSerializer, is backed by Jackson's ObjectMapper. Alternative implementations (e.g. Gson, Moshi) can be supplied to HttpExecutor to swap the library transparently.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <T> T
    deserialize(String json, Type type)
    Deserializes a JSON string into an object of the specified type.
    String
    serialize(Object object)
    Serializes an object to its JSON string representation.

  • Method Details

    • deserialize

      <T> T deserialize(String json, Type type)
      Deserializes a JSON string into an object of the specified type.

      The type parameter may be a plain Class, a ParameterizedType (e.g. List<User>), or any other Type supported by the underlying library.

      Type Parameters:
      T - the expected result type
      Parameters:
      json - the raw JSON string to parse
      type - the target type; must not be null
      Returns:
      the deserialized object
      Throws:
      JsonException - if parsing fails

    • serialize

      String serialize(Object object)
      Serializes an object to its JSON string representation.
      Parameters:
      object - the object to serialize; must not be null
      Returns:
      a JSON string representation of object
      Throws:
      JsonException - if serialization fails
